title: A Strange Facility Beneath the Giant Tree
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Luffy, Unknown person #7, Loki, Unknown person #8, Zoro, Unknown person #9 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't the scene I pictured from your description.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He wasn't like this when I saw him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The animals have been attacked too! Hang in there, guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who did this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's big even for a giant.

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Loki, say some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah! He's breathing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't give him the key yet, Luffy! This changes things!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: C'mon, zero! Lend me a::

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Those chains must be made from Seastone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could've taken out all these big beasts???

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: hold on, Luffy. Let's wait a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This giant's about to die!! We've gotta help him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We don't owe him a thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't spoken to him, but we shouldn't take his bad reputation lightly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This guy's as big as OARS!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we let him run loose, it may not end pretty, even for a country like Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just wait...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Woah!!! What the heck, Zoro?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: AYAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems those bloody wounds are definitely the real deal, so he's not faking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn you... what the hell?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Flop...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he is dead, that was simply his fate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You can be a real jerk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fine, I'll go along with unlocking him,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But let's leave some seasons around one of his legs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can talk it out more once he regains consciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: All right!! Then, let's go fetch chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The library is way too far away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bet we'll find a doctor partying back at the village though...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
